creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Cress from comment #0)
Best idea is that your code has a bug.

Also, backtraces from libraries without debugging information compiled in are useless (or too hard to interpret usefully), since debugger matches nearest defined symbols to the addresses in backtrace, which typically mis-represents the problem. But I am sure that libthr is a victim of unrelated bug in other code.
